---
title: "Skill Gap Analysis"
author: "Yifan Cui"
format: html
---

# Skill Gap Analysis

This section analyzes the gap between current skills and market demand.

## Skill Level Heatmap

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import seaborn as sns
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

# your skill levels
skills_data = {
    "Skill": ["Python", "SQL", "Machine Learning", "Data Visualization", "Cloud"],
    "Level": [4, 3, 3, 4, 2]
}

df = pd.DataFrame(skills_data)
df = df.set_index("Skill")

plt.figure(figsize=(6,3))
sns.heatmap(df, annot=True, cmap="coolwarm")
plt.title("Skill Level Heatmap")
plt.show()
```

## Interpretation

The heatmap shows that I have strong skills in Python and Data Visualization, while my Cloud Computing skills are relatively weaker. This indicates a clear skill gap that needs improvement.
